components.name: accordion
components.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

components.name: alert-dialog
components.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.

components.name: autocomplete
components.description: An input with a list of filtered options that appear as the user types.

components.name: avatar
components.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

components.name: badge
components.description: A small status descriptor for UI elements.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

components.name: button
components.description: A clickable element that triggers an action.

components.name: card
components.description: A container for grouping related content and actions.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and unchecked states.

components.name: collapsible
components.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

components.name: combobox
components.description: An input combined with a listbox for selecting from a list of options.

components.name: command
components.description: A command palette component for searching and executing actions.

components.name: dialog
components.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

components.name: drawer
components.description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.description: Displays a menu to the user — such as a set of actions or functions — triggered by a button.

components.name: empty-state
components.description: Empty state with icon, title, description, and action.

components.name: field
components.description: A form field layout component with label, description, and error support.

components.name: input
components.description: A text input field.

components.name: input-group
components.description: A composite input component with addons, icons, and buttons.

components.name: item
components.description: A flexible list item component with media, content, actions, and variants.

components.name: label
components.description: Accessible form label with required indicator.

components.name: menubar
components.description: A visually persistent menu common in desktop applications providing quick access to commands.

components.name: navigation-menu
components.description: A collection of navigation links with sub-menus that appear on hover.

components.name: number-field
components.description: A numeric input with increment and decrement buttons.

components.name: pagination
components.description: Page navigation with first, last, next, and previous buttons.

components.name: popover
components.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

components.name: preview-card
components.description: A card that appears on hover to preview linked content.

components.name: progress
components.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

components.name: radio-group
components.description: A set of checkable buttons where no more than one can be checked at a time.

components.name: scroll-area
components.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

components.name: select
components.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from — triggered by a button.

components.name: separator
components.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with pulse animation.

components.name: slider
components.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

components.name: spinner
components.description: An animated loading spinner indicator.

components.name: switch
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

components.name: table
components.description: Semantic table primitives for displaying data.

components.name: tabs
components.description: A set of layered sections of content — known as tab panels — that are displayed one at a time.

components.name: textarea
components.description: A multi-line text input field.

components.name: toast
components.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

components.name: toggle
components.description: A two-state button that can be toggled on or off.

components.name: toggle-group
components.description: A set of two-state buttons grouped together.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when focused or hovered.
